Class# QLFilePreviewRequest

iOS 15.0+iPadOS 15.0+Mac Catalyst 15.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
class QLFilePreviewRequest
```

## [Overview](/documentation/QuickLook/QLFilePreviewRequest#overview)

This class contains information about the preview that should be provided.

## [Topics](/documentation/QuickLook/QLFilePreviewRequest#topics)

### [Instance Properties](/documentation/QuickLook/QLFilePreviewRequest#Instance-Properties)

[`var fileURL: URL`](/documentation/quicklook/qlfilepreviewrequest/fileurl)The url of the file for which a preview is being requested.## [Relationships](/documentation/QuickLook/QLFilePreviewRequest#relationships)

## [See Also](/documentation/QuickLook/QLFilePreviewRequest#see-also)

### [QuickLookUI symbols](/documentation/QuickLook/QLFilePreviewRequest#QuickLookUI-symbols)

[`class QLPreviewProvider`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewprovider)[`class QLPreviewReply`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreply)[`class QLPreviewReplyAttachment`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment)[`protocol QLPreviewItem`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewitem)[`protocol QLPreviewingController`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewingcontroller)For view based previews, the view controller that implements the QLPreviewingController protocol must at least implement one of the two following methods: -[QLPreviewingController preparePreviewOfSearchableItemWithIdentifier:queryString:completionHandler:], to generate previews for Spotlight searchable items. -[QLPreviewingController preparePreviewOfFileAtURL:completionHandler:], to generate previews for file URLs.
